subcodes.first_line: O compatriot of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter brought me joy, for thou art of the people of light, and my ardent wish is that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هموطن جمال مبارک مرا از نامه تو سروری زیرا از اهل نوری و آرزویم چنان که
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
